subject: DevOps
title: Cloud Certifications and Career Paths
description: Learn Cloud Certifications and Career Paths in one minute.

hook.text: AWS Solutions Architect is the top cloud cert. Certified pros earn 20 to 30% more on average.

buildup.text: Each provider offers cert tiers: foundational, associate, professional, and specialty.

discovery.text: AWS, Azure, and GCP certs cover architecture, DevOps, security, and data. Pick your path.

twist.text: Certs prove knowledge, not experience. Pair them with hands-on projects for real depth.

climax.text: Cloud-agnostic certs like CKA and Terraform Certified are valuable across all providers.

punchline.text: Certify to prove knowledge. Build to gain experience.

quiz.question: Why are cloud-agnostic certifications like CKA valuable?
options: They apply across all cloud providers, not just one vendor
They are easier to pass than vendor-specific certifications
They guarantee a job at any cloud provider
